## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt && make lint && make test` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change (especially anything touching
      `headerInjector`, per-backend HTTP clients, or `${VAR}` interpolation)

- [ ] No new direct dependency in `go.mod`, or one is justified in the
